projects.title: Planning Poker
projects.description: A lightweight point estimation tool for agile workflows. Supports multiple rooms, link sharing, and realtime user updates.

projects.title: Liked Song Memories
projects.description: On-this-day memories for Spotify liked songs. Shows tracks you favorited on today's date across past years, with album art rendered in a terminal UI.

projects.title: Pettopia
projects.description: API for fictional vet business to manager customer and pet services, including invoice generation.
